# terrible_dellemc_openmanage_ome_active_directory (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `certificate_file` (String) Provide the full path of the SSL certificate. The certificate should be a Root CA Certificate encoded in Base64 format. This is applicable when *validate_certificate* is `true`.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `domain_controller_lookup` (String) Select the Domain Controller Lookup method.
- `domain_controller_port` (Number) Domain controller port. By default, Global Catalog Address port number 3269 is populated. For the Domain Controller Access, enter 636 as the port number. `NOTE`, Only LDAPS ports are supported.
- `domain_password` (String) Provide the domain password. This is applicable when *test_connection* is `true`.
- `domain_server` (String) Enter the domain name or FQDN or IP address of the domain controller. If *domain_controller_lookup* is `DNS`, enter the domain name to query DNS for the domain controllers. If *domain_controller_lookup* is `MANUAL`, enter the FQDN or the IP address of the domain controller. The maximum number of Active Directory servers that can be added is three.
- `domain_username` (String) Provide the domain username either in the UPN (username@domain) or NetBIOS (domain\\\\username) format. This is applicable when *test_connection* is `true`.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `group_domain` (String) Provide the group domain in the format `example.com` or `ou=org, dc=example, dc=com`.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `name` (String) Provide a name for the Active Directory connection. This is applicable for creation and deletion. This is mutually exclusive with *name*.
- `network_timeout` (Number) Enter the network timeout duration in seconds. The supported timeout duration range is 15 to 300 seconds.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `search_timeout` (Number) Enter the search timeout duration in seconds. The supported timeout duration range is 15 to 300 seconds.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) `present` allows to create or modify an Active Directory service. `absent` allows to delete a Active Directory service.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `test_connection` (Boolean) Enables testing the connection to the domain controller. The connection to the domain controller is tested with the provided Active Directory service details. If test fails, module will error out. If `true`, *domain_username* and *domain_password* has to be provided.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `validate_certificate` (Boolean) Enables validation of SSL certificate of the domain controller. The module will always report change when this is `true`.

### Read-Only

- `active_directory` (String) The Active Directory that was added, modified or deleted by this module.
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `error_info` (String) Details of the HTTP Error.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `msg` (String) Overall status of the Active Directory operation.
